source_matrix.access_method: HTTPS JSON endpoints: submissions and companyfacts
source_matrix.auth_requirement: No API key; descriptive User-Agent required for live use
source_matrix.constraints: US-listed company coverage; filing latency; structured facts vary by issuer
source_matrix.coverage: Company filings, company facts, filing metadata
source_matrix.data_quality_risk: Narrative text and XBRL tags need issuer-aware interpretation
source_matrix.license_usage_concern: Public SEC data; comply with fair access and User-Agent policy
source_matrix.mybroker_use_case: Company-specific evidence, event catalysts, risk language, fundamentals context

source_matrix.constraints: Macro series selection and release calendars must be curated
source_matrix.coverage: Rates, inflation, labor, GDP, credit, macro indicators
source_matrix.data_quality_risk: Series revisions and units can be misunderstood by beginners
source_matrix.license_usage_concern: Check FRED terms and attribution requirements
source_matrix.mybroker_use_case: Macro regime context and scenario branch triggers

source_matrix.constraints: High noise; query design and deduping matter
source_matrix.coverage: Global news, events, themes, locations, tone
source_matrix.data_quality_risk: News duplication, source bias, and weak relevance can distort narratives
source_matrix.license_usage_concern: Respect GDELT use guidance and source publisher rights
source_matrix.mybroker_use_case: Narrative/event graph and persona disagreement evidence

source_matrix.constraints: Coverage and symbols need validation; not an official exchange feed
source_matrix.data_quality_risk: Corporate actions, symbol mapping, and stale downloads must be checked
source_matrix.mybroker_use_case: Price context, trend/risk evidence, scenario validation hints

source_matrix.constraints: Rate-limited free tier; terms and output size restrictions
source_matrix.coverage: Market prices, indicators, some economic/company data
source_matrix.data_quality_risk: Free-tier throttling and adjusted/unadjusted data choices
source_matrix.license_usage_concern: Follow Alpha Vantage terms and attribution requirements
source_matrix.mybroker_use_case: Fallback market data and technical indicators

source_matrix.auth_requirement: Free account/API key for many flows
source_matrix.constraints: Free and premium datasets mixed; dataset-specific terms
source_matrix.coverage: Curated financial, economic, and alternative datasets
source_matrix.data_quality_risk: Dataset availability and licensing can change
source_matrix.mybroker_use_case: Optional curated datasets after license review

items.title: AI infrastructure demand keeps data center and chip supply chains in focus
items.text: AI infrastructure demand keeps data center and chip supply chains in focus Global news coverage continues to connect artificial intelligence spending with data center capacity, GPU supply, cloud infrastructure, electricity demand, and semiconductor supply chain constraints.

items.title: Higher yields pressure growth themes despite resilient demand
items.text: Higher yields pressure growth themes despite resilient demand Market narratives point to Treasury yield volatility and Federal Reserve rate expectations as a source of pressure for long-duration growth themes, even where consumer and enterprise demand remains resilient.

items.title: SPY broad market trend sample
items.text: SPY market proxy moved 상승 1.46% from 2026-05-20 to 2026-05-28. This price evidence helps test whether news narratives align with broad market risk appetite, rates pressure, and volatility.

items.title: Apple Inc. 10-Q
items.text: Apple Inc. filed 10-Q on 2026-05-01. Business context: Quarterly filing discusses consumer demand, services revenue, supply chain risk, AI features, and macroeconomic uncertainty.. This public filing evidence can anchor company-specific risk, consumer demand, supply chain, and AI infrastructure narratives.

items.title: Apple Inc. 8-K
items.text: Apple Inc. filed 8-K on 2026-05-02. Business context: Current report provides event evidence that can anchor company-specific scenario branches and risk review.. This public filing evidence can anchor company-specific risk, consumer demand, supply chain, and AI infrastructure narratives.

graph.narrative_summary: Public evidence connects 5 items across topics: ai_infrastructure, consumer, rates, risk, semiconductors.

configured_interests.name: AI infrastructure
configured_interests.description: AI data center, GPU, cloud, power, and semiconductor demand.
configured_interests.beginner_focus: AI 수요가 실제 실적과 공급망으로 이어지는지 이해한다.

configured_interests.name: Semiconductors
configured_interests.description: Chip supply chain, memory, foundry, and AI-linked demand.
configured_interests.beginner_focus: 반도체가 AI 기대와 경기 둔화 리스크를 동시에 받는 이유를 본다.

configured_interests.name: US rates

configured_interests.beginner_focus: 금리가 성장 테마의 가격 부담을 어떻게 바꾸는지 본다.

configured_interests.name: Consumer weakness

configured_interests.beginner_focus: 소비 둔화가 기업 매출과 경기 기대에 주는 영향을 이해한다.

configured_interests.name: Korea semiconductors

configured_interests.beginner_focus: Korea semiconductors 흐름이 시장에 왜 중요한지 초보자 관점에서 이해한다.
